cenas.dalle_prompt: A dog performs a rapid-fire sequence of tricks based on hand signals alone, no verbal cues: Pata -> Toca Aqui -> Gira -> Reverência. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: Fast-paced cuts showing the owner giving a quick sequence of hand signals and the dog responding instantly and flawlessly.

cenas.dalle_prompt: The dog is performing a story-based routine. The owner says "Oh não, um vilão!". The dog barks ("Fala!"). The owner says "Bang!". The dog plays "Morto!". The owner says "Ufa, você o pegou!". The dog takes a "Reverência". 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A fun, theatrical sequence that tells a mini-story, showcasing the dog's ability to chain tricks together contextually.

cenas.dalle_prompt: The dog is helping with chores: it picks up a toy ("Busca"), puts it in the box ("Guarda"), then goes to the door and rings a bell ("Sinetinha") to ask to go outside as a reward. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A continuous shot that follows the dog as it completes a useful chain of household tasks.

cenas.dalle_prompt: A split screen showing three different dogs performing three different long trick sequences simultaneously, showcasing the versatility and potential of chaining. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: The three videos play in sync, creating a dynamic and impressive display of what's possible.

cenas.dalle_prompt: Final shot of a dog and owner taking a final bow together to an imaginary audience, as if they've just finished a Broadway show. Text overlay: "O Show é Todo de Vocês". 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A grand, theatrical final shot with spotlights and a red curtain. The text appears in a dazzling, Broadway-style font.
